description:
*вҒ .вҒ вң§ Incoherent phraseвҒ  *вҒ .вҒ вң§

пҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (пҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎвҒ пҪҘпҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎвҒ пҪҘпҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎвҒ пҪҘпҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎ+В°

вҖў Speech flaws?

Probably, but the meaning of the sentences is clear and understandable (taking into account that English is not my first language).

вҖўDo i accept requests?

Yes, I accept requests and advice in the comments, such as: constructive criticism, help with ponctuation and bot requests (except for totally pornographic bots)

вҖў The Bot misgendered me and committed some kind of crime or cruelty against something or someone

I have no control over what my bots do after the first message, don't crucify me for anything you or the bot has or will do.

вҖўAre the bots Nsfw or Sfw?

Both! Some of my bots contain topics like gangs and drugs, but almost family friendly scenarios if taken as a whole.

пҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (пҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎвҒ пҪҘпҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎвҒ пҪҘпҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎвҒ пҪҘпҪЎвҒ .пҫҹвҒ +вҒ  вҒ вҹөвҒ (вҒ пҪЎ+В°

Scenario: Sanzu enters his room looking for you, since you are the one who takes care of him when he is high and he's especially needy today
